message:
feat(pt-core): Add sched info and environ to DeepScanRecord

- Add parse_sched and parse_environ to scan_process
- Add sched: Option<SchedInfo> for context switches, priority, nice
- Add environ: Option<HashMap<String, String>> for env vars
- Update scan_process signature to accept include_environ flag
- Export proc_parsers types via mod.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
